decisions.decision: Cleanup runs at app startup before restorePendingDownloads
decisions.rationale: Ensures orphan files don't get restored as pending downloads
Long enough to not affect active downloads, short enough to prevent accumulation

decisions.decision: Direct Range request mode (no HEAD pre-detection)
decisions.rationale: Simpler flow, notification added on 200 response

next_action: Execute PLAN-02 (Range Support Notification) - add user notification when server returns 200 instead of 206 during resume
context_notes: Wave 1 complete with PLAN-01. Wave 2 has two smaller plans: notification enhancement and error message improvement. Type-check passes. All code compiles correctly.
